note: AI Engine page advanced to v0.18.0 with the new M18 (Project Registry + Capability Gates) section. Closes the multi-repo gap: the readonly adapters were locked to materials-engine-private; M18 ships a stdlib JSON registry declaring six projects (materials / geaspirit / geadeep / sost / materials_discovery / useful_compute) with their real ~/SOST/... paths plus five canonical capability gates (can_run_dft / can_publish / can_touch_consensus / can_use_network / can_write_repo) with strict deny-by-default semantics. The shipped JSON never grants consensus / publish / DFT — verified by belt+braces tests. Adapter integration is back-compat preserving (historical parents[3] kept as explicit _FALLBACK_ROOT). Tests 1,188 / 1,188 green. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
